commands.title: Registry Run key persistence (staged)
commands.description: Installs meterpreter to HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run. Reconnects every 30s. Uses staged payload.

commands.title: Registry Run key persistence (via script)
commands.description: Old-style persistence script. Uses METERPRETER's built-in 'run persistence' for registry, startup folder, and service persistence.

commands.title: Registry + Startup + Service persistence (multi-method)
commands.description: Installs persistence via RUN key, All Users Startup folder, and as a service. All three methods for redundancy.

commands.title: Windows service persistence (exploit module)
commands.description: Uses exploit/windows/local/persistence_service to install payload as a Windows service.

commands.title: User-level persistence via S4U (s4u_persistence)
commands.description: Installs a persistent payload at the user level. Uses the s4u_persistence local exploit module.

commands.title: Volume Shadow Copy persistence (vss_persistence)
commands.description: Hides payload in a Volume Shadow Copy. Survives disk formatting and reinstallation. Very stealthy.

commands.title: Manual schtasks persistence (daily at 9am)
commands.description: Creates a scheduled task that runs the payload daily at 9 AM using native schtasks.exe.

commands.title: Manual schtasks persistence (on logon)
commands.description: Creates a scheduled task that runs whenever any user logs on.

commands.title: Manual schtasks persistence (every 5 min)
commands.description: Creates a scheduled task that runs every 5 minutes.

commands.title: Sticky Keys backdoor (sethc.exe → cmd.exe)
commands.description: Replaces sethc.exe with cmd.exe. Press Shift 5 times at login to get SYSTEM shell.

commands.title: Utilman backdoor (Utilman.exe → cmd.exe)
commands.description: Replaces Utilman.exe with cmd.exe. Press Win+U to get SYSTEM shell at login.

commands.title: Narrator backdoor (Narrator.exe → cmd.exe)
commands.description: Replaces Narrator.exe with cmd.exe. Press Win+Ctrl+Enter to get SYSTEM shell at login.

commands.title: IFEO persistence (Image File Execution Options)
commands.description: Sets cmd.exe as debugger for sethc.exe. When sethc runs (Shift x5 at login), cmd.exe opens as SYSTEM.
commands.template: shell reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options\sethc.exe" /v Debugger /t REG_SZ /d "C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe" /f

commands.title: Startup folder persistence (All Users)
commands.description: Places a shortcut or payload in the All Users Startup folder.

commands.title: WMI subscription persistence (Event Consumer)
commands.description: Creates a WMI event subscription that runs payload when system starts up. Stealthy — no file, no registry run key.
commands.template: shell wmic /namespace:\\root\subscription PATH __EventFilter CREATE Name="UpdateFilter", EventNameSpace="root\cimv2", QueryLanguage="WQL", Query="SELECT * FROM __InstanceModificationEvent WITHIN 60 WHERE TargetInstance ISA 'Win32_PerfFormattedData_PerfOS_System' AND TargetInstance.SystemUpTime >= 240 AND TargetInstance.SystemUpTime < 325"

commands.title: Auto-migrate to a persistent process
commands.description: Migrates meterpreter to lsass.exe or explorer.exe so payload survives if current process is killed.

commands.title: Executable download + AutoRun persistence
commands.description: Downloads an exe from your web server and installs it in the startup folder in one command.

commands.title: Install SSH server on target (persistent access)
commands.description: Installs and starts an SSH server on Windows for persistent remote access.

commands.title: Create a backdoor user account (local)
commands.description: Creates a local user and adds to Administrators group for persistent access.
commands.template: shell net user {new_user} {new_pass} /add && net localgroup Administrators {new_user} /add

commands.title: Create hidden backdoor user (Windows)
commands.description: Creates a hidden user account (name ends with $) that doesn't appear in login screen.
commands.template: shell net user hidden$ P@ssw0rd! /add && net localgroup Administrators hidden$ /add

commands.title: List all startup programs (registry)
commands.description: Enumerates programs set to run at startup from registry Run keys.

commands.title: List all scheduled tasks
commands.description: Enumerates scheduled tasks on the target system.

commands.title: List all running services
commands.description: Shows all services currently installed and running on the target.
